name: Bengal Spiced Chicken
recipeIngredient: Breast, boneless and skinless, cut into bite-sized pieces
1 Celestial Seasonings Bengal Spice tea bag
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------------SAUCE-----------------------------------
1. Prepare the sauce: Place the tea bag in a cup of water and microwave for 2 minutes. Remove the tea bag and discard it.
2. Add the remaining sauce ingredients (sugar, soy sauce) to the tea mixture and stir well.
3. Coat a large skillet with cooking spray.
4. Cook garlic and ginger for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
5. Add chicken pieces to the skillet and cook until they are opaque on all sides.
6. Pour in the sauce and bring it to a boil, then lower the heat and simmer for another 10 minutes.
7. Stir in the corn starch dissolved in water, and continue cooking over high heat until the sauce thickens.
Serve over rice.
